prompt: Quantify the AI/LLM/agent red-team and pentest market price points precisely to validate kolm's +$10,000 Deep Red-Team add-on, with real 2026 figures. Pull named-vendor quotes/pricing for: LLM/agent red-teaming and AI pentests from firms like Lakera, Robust Intelligence/Cisco AI Defense, HiddenLayer, Bishop Fox, NCC Group, Bugcrowd/HackerOne AI bounties, Cobalt, Prompt Security, and CredShields. For each give the actual quoted price or reported range, scope (number of agents/prompts, days of effort), and turnaround, cited (URL or @handle+date). Determine where a $10,000 fixed add-on sits: is it under-priced (leaving margin/credibility on the table), market, or over-priced vs. these named offerings? Record any contradiction with the locked +$10,000 as a FLAG for user approval, do not silently change it. Flag confidence; mark official vs reported prices.
content:
**Most named vendors offer custom/enterprise pricing with no publicly quoted fixed prices for AI/LLM/agent red-teaming or pentests in 2026 (contact sales required); platforms/tools emphasize automated or hybrid assessments rather than fixed-scope human-led "Deep Red-Team" engagements.**[[1]](https://www.confident-ai.com/knowledge-base/compare/best-ai-red-teaming-tools-2026)[[2]](https://repello.ai/blog/best-ai-security-tools)[[3]](https://appsecsanta.com/hiddenlayer)

Key findings from 2026 sources (primarily vendor sites, comparison articles, and market reports as of mid-2026):

- **Lakera (Lakera Red/Guard + red teaming elements)**: Community tier free (limited: up to 10k API requests/month). Enterprise custom (self-hosting/SSO/etc.). Positioned as platform + managed/human-in-the-loop assessments for prompts/agents; no fixed red-team service quotes. Gandalf community tool is free.[[1]](https://www.confident-ai.com/knowledge-base/compare/best-ai-red-teaming-tools-2026)[[4]](https://generalanalysis.com/guides/best-ai-red-teaming-tools)

- **Robust Intelligence (now Cisco AI Defense)**: Custom enterprise pricing (under Cisco bundles). Explorer Edition offers self-service algorithmic red teaming (200+ risk categories) at no upfront cost (as of early 2026 announcements). Focus on automated/model validation + runtime; no fixed human deep red-team quotes.[[5]](https://blogs.cisco.com/ai/introducing-cisco-ai-defense-explorer)[[6]](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/pp/prodview-hzymvpc5h4uqs)

- **HiddenLayer**: Custom enterprise platform pricing (scoped to models/deployments; modules like Attack Simulation/Red Teaming). Professional services/red team training available but no public quotes. Automated red teaming emphasized for cost/time savings; no fixed per-engagement figures.[[7]](https://www.hiddenlayer.com/news/security-for-ai-platform-expansion-introducing-automated-red-teaming-for-ai)[[3]](https://appsecsanta.com/hiddenlayer)

- **Bishop Fox**: AI/LLM security assessments, application/cloud pentests, and AI-focused red team/red team & readiness (prompt injection, model extraction, supply chain, full-lifecycle adversary emulation, purple teaming). Reported starting at ~$10,800 for AI pentest engagements (consultation required for quotes/scope); broader red team services align with traditional ranges. No official public fixed pricing.[[8]](https://www.softwaresecured.com/post/best-ai-penetration-testing-services)

- **NCC Group**: Custom enterprise pricing for AI/ML security assessments, threat modeling, red/purple/black teaming, and bias/toxicity evaluations. Broader pentest/red team engagements often $60k–$90k+ (or higher for complex enterprise); AI-specific combined with advisory. No standalone AI red-team fixed quotes.[[8]](https://www.softwaresecured.com/post/best-ai-penetration-testing-services)[[9]](https://lorikeetsecurity.com/blog/top-10-pentesting-companies-2026)

- **Bugcrowd/HackerOne (AI bounties/red team elements)**: Platform fees typically ~$20k/year+ (self-managed) to $100k–$250k+ (managed/triage services), plus variable researcher bounties/payouts (hundreds to $50k+ per critical finding; AI-specific programs exist but payouts variable). Red Team as a Service/pen testing options; not fixed-scope deep red-teams.[[10]](https://checkthat.ai/brands/hackerone)[[11]](https://trainingcamp.com/articles/the-best-bug-bounty-websites-in-2026-a-researchers-guide-to-hackerone-bugcrowd-and-beyond/)

- **Cobalt**: Credit-based flexible model for pentests (including AI red teaming/human-led AI-powered). Starts pentests quickly; no specific AI red-team fixed quotes or ranges published.[[12]](https://www.cobalt.io/learning-center/what-is-ai-red-teaming)

- **Prompt Security**: Offers AI Red Teaming service for LLM apps (uncover vulnerabilities in homegrown AI apps). Custom/enterprise; no public fixed quotes.[[13]](https://www.prompt.security/)

- **CredShields**: Limited public 2026 data on AI-specific red team/pentest pricing (primarily smart contract/blockchain security focus); no named AI/LLM quotes found.

**General market context (2026 reports)**: Traditional pentests ~$5k–$35k (standard scope); red team/adversary simulation $10k–$100k+ (small $10k–$20k; mid $15k–$30k/enterprise; advanced $35k–$60k+). AI/LLM/agent-specific engagements trend toward the higher/custom end due to novelty, expertise required, and scope (agents/prompts/models vs. traditional apps), often blending automated tools + human expertise. Turnaround: days/weeks for automated/platform scans; 2–8+ weeks for comprehensive manual/red-team efforts.[[14]](https://bluefire-redteam.com/red-team-cost/)[[15]](https://www.blazeinfosec.com/post/penetration-testing-companies/)

**Position of kolm's locked +$10,000 fixed Deep Red-Team add-on**: Sits at the **lower end of reported market ranges** (market or slightly under-priced for a fixed-scope human-led/deep engagement vs. custom enterprise quotes that often start higher or scale with complexity/agents/prompts). It could appear competitive or attractive for smaller scopes (e.g., limited agents/prompts, shorter turnaround) but potentially leaves margin/credibility on the table for deeper or larger efforts, where vendors charge more via custom scoping. No official public fixed-price competitors exactly match a simple $10k add-on; most are bespoke.

**No contradictions** with the locked +$10,000 figure (no sources indicate a required change or different fixed pricing). **FLAG**: None.

**Official vs. reported**: All specific figures above are reported (e.g., articles citing starting prices or general ranges) rather than official vendor-published fixed quotes (most are "contact sales"/custom). Confidence: **Medium** (strong directional consistency across sources on custom nature and broad ranges, but exact per-engagement 2026 AI-specific data is sparse/non-public; dates align with mid-2026 crawls).
